author: JOHN TYRRELL
body: Have watched LATER WITH JOOLS since 1991, but, of course it can only run for a limited time each year. It needs some complementary music input.I( can heartily recommend the MEZZO channel (from France) who make a programme called JAZZ MIX. Although we can’t get MEZZO in the UK, perhaps the BBC could stump up some cash to air the brilliant JAZZ MIX. It’s not all pure jazz, but it’s all brilliant music, and would complement LATER perfectly. I can onl;y see JAZZ MIX in Northern Cyprus, unfortunately. For instance, I’ve seen Massive Attack juxtaposed with Sonny Rollins – very successfully

author: gucci bags
body: However, I have managed to locate an mp3 version of Radiohead’s live video, “House of Cards”, and you can get this below.
